title: is_local_admin grants admin to any link-local peer
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_keys.c:834-858. spec/11-lci.md §17.6.3: Admin level (DELETE /keys, PUT /config) is determined by transport (USB = admin, BLE = standard). is_local_admin() returns true for ANY IPv6 link-local source (net_ipv6_is_ll_addr) — all LICHEN mesh peers use fe80::/10 link-local (spec §6.1), so any mesh peer is admin. Defeats the TOFU pinning the code implements: a peer can DELETE /keys/{iid} then re-PUT its own pubkey with trust=verified. No interface/scope check, no OSCORE despite §17.6.2. Verified by reviewer + lead. Fix: check receiving interface (sin6_scope_id / net_pkt_iface) against the LCI transport, or require an OSCORE admin context; do not infer locality from source address.
